name: Tangy Cranberry Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------LARGE LOAF---------------------------------
1 1/4 cups Cranberry juice
1/3 cup Cranberries, dried
3 cups White bread flour
3 tablespoons Orange marmalade
2 tablespoons Dry milk
2 teaspoons Fast rise yeast OR
1 1/2 teaspoons Salt
3 teaspoons Active dry yeast
2 tablespoons Butter
Dried cranberries are sometimes called "ruby raisins." SUCCESS HINTS: Place dried cranberries away from water if baking on delayed time cycle. This recipe can be baked with regular or delayed time baking cycles CALORIES: 182 PROTEIN: 10% CHOLESTEROL: 5.3mg CARBOHYDRATES: 78% SODIUM: 289mg FAT: 12% ~- from ELECTRIC BREAD, Innovative Cooking Enterprises, Inc.
